name: Purple Cow Winery
tagline: A former dairy farm, now a family winery — Bloomsburg, PA.
seoDescription: Purple Cow Winery — a family-owned winery on a former dairy farm in Bloomsburg, PA. House-made wines, live music, lawn games, and friendly farm animals.

hero.heading: Once a dairy farm. Now your favorite winery.
hero.subheading: A family-owned winery with a farmhouse feel, tucked along the back roads of Bloomsburg — house-made wines, live music, lawn games, and a few friendly farm animals.

images.heroAlt: Purple Cow Winery in Bloomsburg, PA

about.heading: From dairy farm to tasting room
body: The farm came first — that's where the name comes from. This family-owned winery sits on a former dairy farm along the rolling back roads outside Bloomsburg, and every bottle is produced and filled right here on the property.

It's the kind of place you come to relax and stay: a farmhouse-feel tasting room, live music on the weekends, corn hole and giant Connect Four on the lawn, and friendly farm animals wandering the grounds. Bring friends, bring family — there's a pour and a porch swing with your name on it.

services.title: House-made wines
services.description: Small-farm wines produced and bottled on-site — including local favorites like Purple Haze and Udder Chaos.

services.title: Tastings
services.description: Settle in and sample the lineup in a relaxed, farmhouse-style tasting room.

services.title: Live music & games
services.description: Weekend live music, corn hole, and giant Connect Four out on the lawn.

services.title: Family & farm-friendly
services.description: Friendly farm animals and open space make it an easy afternoon for the whole crew.

hoursNote: Closed Monday–Thursday. Check our Facebook for live-music nights and seasonal events.

sections.heading: Wine, music, and a little chaos

items.a: Very — open space, lawn games, and farm animals make it an easy afternoon for all ages.
Most weekends. Check our Facebook for who's playing before you head out.

sections.heading: Come hang at the farm.
sections.text: House-made wine, live music, lawn games, and a few friendly animals — all on a former dairy farm.
